'''ngapate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rushingly|rushingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-p-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rushingly|rushingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngapate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ngapate|ngapate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngapatesher|ngapatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngapatesherĂ«m|ngapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngapatero|ngapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngapateshĂ«|ngapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngapateshĂ«m|ngapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingapatero|gokingapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingapateshĂ«|gokingapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingapateshĂ«m|gokingapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongapankerom|gongapankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongapankeshĂ«|gongapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongapankeshĂ«m|gongapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongapankeya|gongapankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngapaterom|ngapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngapatemu|ngapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngapateya|ngapateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingapaterom|gokingapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingapatemu|gokingapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingapateya|gokingapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngapapate|ngapapate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngapapatesher|ngapapatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngapapatesherĂ«m|ngapapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngapapatero|ngapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngapapateshĂ«|ngapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngapapateshĂ«m|ngapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingapapatero|gokingapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingapapateshĂ«|gokingapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingapapateshĂ«m|gokingapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongapapankerom|gongapapankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongapapankeshĂ«|gongapapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongapapankeshĂ«m|gongapapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongapapankeya|gongapapankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngapapaterom|ngapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngapapatemu|ngapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngapapateya|ngapapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingapapaterom|gokingapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingapapatemu|gokingapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingapapateya|gokingapapateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngĂŠpĂŠte|ngĂŠpĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngĂŠpĂŠtesher|ngĂŠpĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m|ngĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠpĂŠtero|ngĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|ngĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|ngĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠpĂŠtero|gokingĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|gokingĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|gokingĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongĂŠpĂŠnkerom|gongĂŠpĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«|gongĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gongĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongĂŠpĂŠnkeya|gongĂŠpĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠpĂŠterom|ngĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠpĂŠtemu|ngĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngĂŠpĂŠteya|ngĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠpĂŠterom|gokingĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠpĂŠtemu|gokingĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingĂŠpĂŠteya|gokingĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngafpafte|ngafpafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngafpaftesher|ngafpaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafpaftesherĂ«m|ngafpaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafpaftero|ngafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngafpafteshĂ«|ngafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafpafteshĂ«m|ngafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafpaftero|gokingafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingafpafteshĂ«|gokingafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafpafteshĂ«m|gokingafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongafpafnkerom|gongafpafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongafpafnkeshĂ«|gongafpafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafpafnkeshĂ«m|gongafpafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongafpafnkeya|gongafpafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafpafterom|ngafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafpaftemu|ngafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngafpafteya|ngafpafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafpafterom|gokingafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafpaftemu|gokingafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingafpafteya|gokingafpafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
